options.name: <partition_spec>
options.description: Specification in a format of { [common_parent_hinst:]<h_cell_name1> {<boxes list1>} [common_parent_hinst:]<h_cell_name2> {<boxes list2>} ...}

options.name: -group_instance_suffix
options.description: group instance suffix, default is i

options.name: -logical_spec
options.description: Specification in a format of { <h_cell_name1> {<hinst_or_inst list1>} <h_cell_name2> {<hinst_or_inst list2>} ...}

options.name: -pre_full_upf
options.description: -pre_full_upf is mandatory when -undo set in MSV design

options.name: -undo
options.description: Undo physical group, -pre_full_upf is mandatory when -undo set in MSV design.
